heroHeadline: Ukraine Under Fire: Russian Mega-Strike, Drone Escalation Into Ural Heartland
heroSubtitle: Russia launches 619 drones + 47 missiles in one of 2026's largest attacks as Ukrainian drones reach Sverdlovsk and Chelyabinsk — over 1,700 km from Ukraine — for the first time. Zelensky pushes for direct Putin talks as EU approves €90B aid package.
footerNote: Data sourced from official government reports, UN monitoring missions, major international outlets, and institutional analyses. Historical data draws on peer-reviewed scholarship. Casualty figures are contested; ranges reflect scholarly and official estimates.
